queries.question: Show me the costumes and their costume supervisors that worked to a budget of less than 750k.
queries.sql:
SELECT 
Costumes.Costume_Supervisor,
Costumes.Costumes
FROM Costumes
WHERE Budget < '750000'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?costume_supervisor ?costumes2 WHERE {
  ?costumes a :Costumes .
  ?costumes p:Costume_Supervisor ?costume_supervisor .
  ?costumes p:Costumes ?costumes2 .
  ?costumes p:Budget ?budget_f .
  FILTER(xsd:double(?budget_f) < 750000)
}

queries.question: Show all the costumes with their designer and supervisor that had a budget less than 750k.
queries.sql:
SELECT 
Costumes.Costume_Designer, Costume_Supervisor,
Costumes.Costumes
FROM Costumes
WHERE Budget < '750000'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?costume_designer ?costume_supervisor ?costumes2 WHERE {
  ?costumes a :Costumes .
  ?costumes p:Costume_Designer ?costume_designer .
  ?costumes p:Costume_Supervisor ?costume_supervisor .
  ?costumes p:Costumes ?costumes2 .
  ?costumes p:Budget ?budget_f .
  FILTER(xsd:double(?budget_f) < 750000)
}

queries.question: Give me a list of the costume supervisors where the budget was less than 750k and their costumes.
queries.sql:
SELECT 
Costumes.Costume_Supervisor,
Costumes.Budget
FROM Costumes
WHERE Budget > '750000.0'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?costume_supervisor ?budget WHERE {
  ?costumes a :Costumes .
  ?costumes p:Costume_Supervisor ?costume_supervisor .
  ?costumes p:Budget ?budget .
  ?costumes p:Budget ?budget_f .
  FILTER(xsd:double(?budget_f) > 750000.0)
}

List all costumiers with budget of more than 750000.
